mapper.sql: id, create_time, update_time, user_id, username, `operation`, `module`, ip_address
mapper.insert: insert into tb_audit_log (create_time, update_time, user_id, username, `operation`, `module`, ip_address) values (#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operation,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{module,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

create_time,
update_time,
user_id,
username,
`operation`,
`module`,
ip_address,

mapper.update:
update tb_audit_log
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`operation` = #{operation,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
`module` = #{module,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ip_address = #{ipAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update tb_audit_log set create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `operation` = #{operation,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, `module` = #{module,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ip_address = #{ipAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into tb_audit_log (create_time, update_time, user_id, username, `operation`, `module`, ip_address) values
(#{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.operation,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.module,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.ipAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into tb_audit_log (create_time, update_time, user_id, username, `operation`, `module`, ip_address) values
(#{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.operation,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.module,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.ipAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
on duplicate key update create_time=values(create_time), update_time=values(update_time), user_id=values(user_id), username=values(username), `operation`=values(`operation`), `module`=values(`module`), ip_address=values(ip_address)

delete from tb_audit_log where id in
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update.foreach:
update tb_audit_log
create_time = #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
user_id = #{item.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
username = #{item.username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`operation` = #{item.operation,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
`module` = #{item.module,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ip_address = #{item.ipAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

on duplicate key update
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},

insert into tb_audit_log
id,
create_time,
update_time,
user_id,
username,
`operation`,
`module`,
ip_address,
values
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

#{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operation,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{module,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ipAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
on duplicate key update
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`operation` = #{operation,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
`module` = #{module,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ip_address = #{ipAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.select:
select
from tb_audit_log
and user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
and username like concat('%', #{username}, '%')
and operation like concat('%', #{operation}, '%')
and module like concat('%', #{module}, '%')
and ip_address like concat('%', #{ipAddress}, '%')
order by update_time desc
